title: Belle Vous 300 Pack Acrylic Ice Crystals - Assorted Colours - Fake Diamond Scatter Gemstone Rocks for Weddings, Table Decorations, Vase Filler Stones, Party Favours - Plastic Gems for Arts & Crafts
features: ACRYLIC ICE CRYSTALS: Included in this set are 300 fake diamond scatter rocks in assorted colours. The gemstones are made from high quality acrylic material and comes in two different sizes. There are 100 x 23mm gems and 200 x 14mm gems, both come in a range of colours from pink, light purple, dark purple, green, orange, yellow, light blue, dark blue, white and red. Ideal for wedding table scatter decorations, party favours or inside a clear glass vase.

BRIGHT AND COLOURFUL: These plastic gemstones are made of quality clear, non-toxic, odourless, acrylic material. All the crystals are vibrant, bright and clear. They will add a pop of colour and fun to your events, decorations, home décor or shop window display. These crystals come in various interesting shapes and sizes with no rough edges, making them safer when used as scattered table decorations, embellishments or with arts and crafts projects.

SUITABLE FOR CRAFTING: These plastic acrylic crystal gemstones catch the light beautifully appearing shiny and translucent. They are lightweight and can be used with a hot glue gun to embellish indoor and outdoor decorations creating DIY, personalised, homemade gifts like picture frames, vases and mirrors. They are non-toxic and will not float in the water so you can put them in the bottom of a clear bowl with water and a floating candle on top.

MULTITUDE OF USES: Ideal for confetti, decorations and table arrangements for special occasions such as weddings, baby showers, baby naming’s, bridal showers, engagement parties, sweet 16's and 21st birthday parties. They can also be used for sewing embellishments, fairy garden, making crystal geodes, reward jars, inside a fish tank as aquarium décor, vase fillers, centrepieces, props, and game piece tokens. A must-have for event planners, florists and interior designers.

DESIGNED FOR LIFE: Every product in our collection is built with purpose, blending function and style. Our thoughtfully crafted designs ensure lasting reliability and convenience when needed, ideal for any occasion.
description: Product Description Belle Vous Acrylic Plastic Diamond (Pack of 300) This set contains 300 assorted coloured faux diamond toys. The plastic gems are made of high quality acrylic and have two different sizes. Includes: -300 x Coloured Gems. Dimensions: - 100 x 23 mm plastic diamond. - 200 x 14 mm plastic diamond. Safety Warning Warning! Not suitable for children under the age of three. Choking hazard.
